name: ai-perform:drink-portable:steaming-mug-of-glow
ai-perform:chisel-fixed-display:pumice-slurry-vat
ai-perform:eat-item:roasted-nuts
perform: var output = "You eat the roasted nuts. They're crunchy and surprisingly spicy. Almost immediately, the world seems a little sharper—the grain of the wooden stalls, the subtle hum of the overhead conduits, and the specific metallic tang of the air all become more distinct."; var moveEvent = lib.moveEvent(object.id, { to: "void", from: object.location, description: "Nuts were eaten." }); return { output: output, events: [moveEvent] };

name: ai-refuse:kick-npc:collector
perform: return lib.result("{!" + "The Collector doesn't flinch. They simply wait for your foot to return to the ground before adjusting their loupe with a small, clinical sigh. It is the reaction of someone who has dealt with much more dangerous things than an impatient traveler." + "!}");

if (object.id === 'item:rusty-lever' && indirect.id === 'item:stuck-turnstile') { const exit = world.getEntity('exit:gate:north'); const turnstile = world.getEntity('item:stuck-turnstile'); const lever = world.getEntity('item:rusty-lever'); exit.properties.locked = false; turnstile.description = 'The brass turnstile is now functional, thanks to the rusty lever you have jammed into the socket. It rotates with a satisfyingly heavy click.'; lever.location = 'item:stuck-turnstile'; lever.tags = ['fixed']; return 'With a bit of force, you slide the rusty lever into the turnstile socket. It fits perfectly. You give it a push, and the mechanism groans before clicking into its first rotation. The way north is clear.'; } return null;
